sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ENPHASE PROMISED $370M BUT DELIVERED A $5.56/SHARE LOSS — SUEWALLST, LLP
feed.summary: A securities class action lawsuit led by Levi & Korsinsky, LLP, is targeting Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for allegedly misleading investors with optimistic projections that contradicted actual results, leading to a $5.56 per share loss. The lawsuit claims that Enphase overstated its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate the effects of the 25D Credit termination. Investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to inquire about recovering their losses, with a lead plaintiff deadline set for April 20, 2026.

feed.title: TJX Companies Hit a $60 Billion Milestone: Here’s What to Expect
feed.summary: TJX Companies, operating TJ Maxx, Marshalls, and HomeGoods, has achieved $60 billion in annual net sales for the first time in fiscal 2026, alongside five consecutive years of 5% comparable sales growth. Despite the stock nearing its 52-week high, Wall Street's skepticism regarding fiscal 2027 guidance presents a potential entry point given the company's strong performance, expansion plans, and cost recovery. Valuation models suggest significant upside, supported by continued operational strength and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 0% stake in Newmont (NYSE: NEM) after internal realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0% beneficial ownership in Newmont Corp (NEM) common stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which directs certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report holdings separately. The filing, signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, indicates that Vanguard itself no longer holds or is deemed to hold beneficial ownership over these securities.

feed.title: John Deere and Tarter USA Announce Strategic Partnership to Launch American-Made Flex Wing Rotary Cutters
feed.summary: John Deere and Tarter USA have formed a strategic partnership to manufacture a new line of American-made Flex Wing Rotary Cutters under the Frontier™ brand. This collaboration, based in Liberty, Kentucky, has already seen demand exceed initial forecasts and has created 26 new jobs. The partnership leverages Tarter USA's advanced manufacturing capabilities and John Deere's market understanding to deliver high-quality, durable products for the agricultural sector.

feed.title: Valero Prepares Restart of Port Arthur Refinery After Blast
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp. is preparing to restart its 380,000 barrel-per-day Port Arthur, Texas, oil refinery this week after an explosion and fire shut down key units. The incident, which occurred after process fluid was released on a diesel hydrotreater unit, caused no injuries but was felt 11 miles away. Operators are now working to gradually return the facility to full capacity as refining margins remain strong due to global supply disruptions.

feed.title: Arch Capital Trades Above 200-Day SMA: Time to Hold the Stock?
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. (ACGL) is trading above its 200-day simple moving average, indicating a bullish trend. The company shows strong premium growth, disciplined underwriting, and a robust capital position, reinforcing its sustained growth potential despite a relatively expensive valuation. With favorable return on capital and solid projections, Arch Capital is currently rated a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Truckers at MATS can try DAT's new iPhone load widget and beta
feed.summary: DAT Freight & Analytics will be showcasing new business tools and leading education sessions at the Mid-America Trucking Show (MATS) from March 26–28 in Louisville. Attendees can visit booth 37415 to experience demos, including a new iPhone widget for the DAT One app, and sign up for a beta test of an upcoming load-recommendation feature. The company will also highlight DAT Outgo for freight factoring and the Convoy Platform for automated load management, alongside various events like a silent auction and ProTalks sessions.

feed.title: Hydrogen Fluoride Market Set to Boom Rapidly by 2033 | Honeywell International Inc. • Solvay S.A. • Merck KGaA
feed.summary: A new report by Coherent Market Insights forecasts significant growth for the Hydrogen Fluoride Market between 2026 and 2033. The study provides an in-depth analysis of market size, trends, drivers, and competitive landscape, highlighting key players such as Honeywell International Inc. and Solvay S.A. It aims to offer actionable insights for businesses, investors, and policymakers to navigate market opportunities and risks.

feed.title: General Dynamics Electric Boat Wins $95M Navy Submarine Contract
feed.summary: General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp. secured a $95 million cost-plus-fixed-fee modification from the Navy for engineering, technical, design agent, and planning yard support for operational strategic and attack submarines. The work will be performed in multiple locations and is expected to finish by June 2026. This contract, awarded on March 23, 2026, involves significant fiscal year 2026 funds for research, development, test, and evaluation, along with operations and maintenance.

feed.title: Blackstone invests $250M in UAE firm, reaffirming confidence in the region (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. has invested $250 million in Advanced Digital Gaming Technology, a newly established payments and data intelligence platform based in the United Arab Emirates. This investment reaffirms Blackstone's confidence in the region despite recent adverse impacts on the financial sector due to the Iran war. The move highlights continued private equity interest in the Middle East's technology landscape.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on Eversource Energy to $70 From $75, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has adjusted its price target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $70 from $75, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst revisions for Eversource, highlighting a dynamic outlook for the utility company. Eversource Energy specializes in distributing electricity and natural gas across Connecticut, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire.

feed.title: +4.38% for VeriSign stock as buyers drive price to weekly highs
feed.summary: VeriSign (VRSN) stock surged 4.38% today, closing at $251.70 and achieving a 4.54% weekly gain, driven by strong buyer momentum. Despite the rally, technical indicators suggest overbought conditions, increasing the risk of near-term consolidation or a mild correction. Analysts predict a trading range of $248.40–$257.96 for the coming week, with a low probability of further significant upside given current weekly indicators.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. stock surges on US-Iran peace hopes amid Dow Jones rally
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. stock climbed 1.90% to 225.79 USD on the US exchange, driven by optimism for a US-Iran peace deal that reduced geopolitical risks and boosted the Dow Jones. This surge highlights how de-escalation in energy flashpoints can benefit diversified industrial companies with strong infrastructure exposure. Investors are watching Honeywell's diversified revenue across aviation, energy transition, and productivity software, positioning it well for rotations as capital flows to quality cyclicals.

feed.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Defensive Stocks With Over 7% Dividend Yields
feed.summary: In turbulent market conditions, dividend-yielding defensive stocks become attractive. This article highlights three such stocks in the consumer staples sector—Conagra Brands (CAG), Kraft Heinz Co (KHC), and Energizer Holdings (ENR)—with dividend yields over 7%. It includes recent analyst ratings and price target revisions from top-performing analysts for each company.

feed.title: Assessing APA Corporation (APA) Valuation After Q4 2025 Earnings Beat And Permian Inventory Update
feed.summary: APA Corporation (APA) recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding market expectations, which has led to a significant increase in its share price. Despite trading above the average analyst price target, Simply Wall St's valuation model estimates a fair value of $30.46, suggesting the stock might be overvalued by 35.6%. However, a look at its P/E ratio relative to peers and the industry suggests the market might be applying a lower multiple, potentially indicating a value gap rather than a trap.

feed.title: Progressive prices $1.5B in senior notes; $1,487M net proceeds from debt sale
feed.summary: Progressive (PGR) has priced $1.5 billion in senior notes, expecting net proceeds of $1,487 million. The offering includes $500M of 4.60% notes due 2031 and $1B of 5.15% notes due 2036, with interest payable semi-annually. The closing is anticipated on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Residents Say Con Ed Gas Transmission Line Damaged Sewer Laterals: Con Ed Denies Responsibility
feed.summary: Residents in Fox Meadow and Greenacres, Scarsdale, are encountering significant issues with their sewer laterals after a Con Edison gas transmission line project. Homeowners are finding their sewer lines compressed or damaged, leading to repair costs of $35,000-$42,000, and problems obtaining compliance certificates for home sales. Con Edison and its contractor, Network Infrastructure, are denying responsibility, attributing damage to other causes like tree roots, despite local officials and residents pointing to the gas line installation as the cause.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Reiterates "Equal Weight" Rating for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated an "Equal Weight" rating for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB), adjusting its price target down to $203 from $208, which still suggests a 24.09% upside. Despite the slight reduction, the REIT's stock has faced multiple price target trims from other firms, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $198.44. AvalonBay recently exceeded earnings expectations, posting an EPS of $2.85 against estimates of $2.84, with its shares currently trading near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Meta, Alphabet, Super Micro, Olaplex, Sandisk, Pony AI, and More Stock Market Movers
feed.summary: This article provides a brief overview of stock market movers, including Meta, Alphabet, Super Micro, Olaplex, Sandisk, and Pony AI. The market experienced a downturn on Thursday following Iran's rejection of a cease-fire deal.

feed.title: Shift4 Payments (NYSE:FOUR) Downgraded by Raymond James Financial to "Outperform"
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial downgraded Shift4 Payments (NYSE:FOUR) from "strong-buy" to "outperform" but set a price target of $67.00, implying a 38.09% upside. The company surpassed quarterly earnings estimates with revenue up 50.6% year-over-year and provided strong FY2026 guidance. A major shareholder, Jared Isaacman, recently increased his holdings in the company, bringing insider ownership to over 25%.

feed.title: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) seeks share increase and new special meeting right
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) is preparing for its 2026 virtual annual shareholder meetings where investors will vote on key proposals including the election of 11 directors, executive compensation, and the ratification of the independent auditor. Specifically for CMS shareholders, there will be votes to double authorized common shares from 350 million to 700 million and to amend the restated articles of incorporation to allow shareholders to call a special meeting, a measure the board supports. However, a shareholder proposal to allow action by written consent is recommended against by the board, which cites strong existing corporate governance and the potential for misuse.

feed.title: Progressive (PGR) sells $500 million 2031 and $1 billion 2036 notes
feed.summary: The Progressive Corporation is issuing $1.5 billion in new senior notes across two tranches to secure long-term debt capital, consisting of $500 million of 4.60% Senior Notes due 2031 and $1 billion of 5.15% Senior Notes due 2036. The offering is expected to close on March 26, 2026, with estimated net proceeds of $1.487 billion after underwriting discounts and expenses. Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC and TD Securities (USA) LLC are lead underwriters for the offering.

feed.title: Improving health one In-Home Health Evaluation at a time
feed.summary: CVS Health's Signify Health offers In-Home Health Evaluations (IHEs) where licensed clinicians visit health plan members at home to assess their health, identify risks, and bridge care gaps. These visits provide a more personal and comprehensive view of members' health needs, often uncovering issues missed in traditional doctor's visits, and help members re-engage with the healthcare system. The IHEs support value-based care models by collecting rich data that helps providers and payers identify risks earlier and improve follow-up care.

feed.title: Bunge Global Stock Analysis: Strong Gains Amid Debt & Cash Flow Concerns - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Bunge Global's shares have significantly increased to $119.94 over the last six months, despite analyst caution regarding its financial health. The company's sales growth has been modest, and its earnings per share have declined substantially, while its debt exceeds cash reserves. Analysts suggest the company may need to raise additional capital if core business performance doesn't improve, maintaining a cautious stance despite recent stock gains and a "reasonable" forward P/E multiple.

feed.title: Collins Showcases Vision for Common Air Traffic Control Platform
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace is developing advanced technologies for a common air traffic management platform, including simplified workstations that integrate multiple functions. This initiative aims to streamline air traffic control operations by combining various systems into a more efficient and user-friendly interface. The company is part of RTX, which is focusing on innovation in air traffic control.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) Now Covered by Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has initiated coverage on Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) with a "buy" rating and a $100 price target, suggesting a 24.6% upside. This aligns with a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus, despite recent insider share sales and the CEO's warning about potential credit losses. Wells Fargo recently beat Q1 EPS estimates but slightly missed on revenue.

feed.title: RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE:RLJ) Earns Neutral Rating from Analysts at LADENBURG THALM/SH SH
feed.summary: RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE:RLJ) received a "neutral" rating and an $8.50 price target from LADENBURG THALM/SH SH, implying a 10.7% upside. The company surpassed its Q4 earnings and revenue estimates and provided FY2026 guidance. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, institutional investors have been actively trading shares, with a significant percentage owned by hedge funds.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Begins Coverage on Casey's General Stores (NASDAQ:CASY)
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. initiated coverage on Casey's General Stores (NASDAQ:CASY) with a "neutral" rating and a $719 price target, representing a 0.67% upside. The stock already holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average price target of $700.09. Casey's recent quarter beat EPS expectations but missed on revenue, with the shares trading near their 52-week high.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Begins Coverage on Murphy USA (NYSE:MUSA)
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has initiated coverage on Murphy USA (NYSE:MUSA) with an "overweight" rating and a price target of $539, suggesting a 12.8% upside. This new target is significantly higher than the current broker consensus of $447.33, which recommends a "Hold" rating for the specialty retailer. Murphy USA recently exceeded EPS expectations but missed on revenue for its latest quarter, reporting a 75.75% return on equity and a 2.43% net margin.

feed.title: TIC Solutions (NYSE:TIC) Downgraded by JPMorgan Chase & Co. to Underweight
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. downgraded TIC Solutions (NYSE:TIC) from "neutral" to "underweight" and set a $7.00 price target, indicating a potential 4.96% downside. This follows TIC Solutions missing quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, reporting a negative EPS of ($0.17) against a $0.12 estimate, and revenues of $508.3 million versus $531.1 million. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings or price targets, leading to a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Reduce" with an average target price of $11.00.

feed.title: Noah (NYSE:NOAH) Downgraded by JPMorgan Chase & Co. to Neutral
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has downgraded Noah (NYSE:NOAH) from an "overweight" to a "neutral" rating, setting a $12.00 price target. This downgrade aligns with other analysts who have issued neutral/hold adjustments, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating for the stock with an average price target of $11.00. Noah, a China-based wealth and asset management firm, is currently trading around $11.33.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Coverage Initiated at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group initiated coverage on JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM), assigning a "Hold" rating and a $310.00 price target. This target suggests a potential upside of 4.88% from the stock's current price. JPMorgan recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $5.23 against a forecast of $4.93, and revenue increasing by 7.1% year-over-year.

feed.title: Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) Coverage Initiated by Analysts at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group initiated coverage on Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) with an "underperform" rating and a $35.00 price target, suggesting a potential 22.9% downside. While analyst sentiment is mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $55.13, other firms like Morgan Stanley have recently upgraded the stock with higher targets. Truist recently missed quarterly EPS estimates, announced a $10 billion share buyback program, and has seen recent insider selling.

feed.title: Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) Rating Lowered to Market Perform at Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has downgraded Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) from an "outperform" to a "market perform" rating. Despite this, Global Payments slightly beat quarterly EPS estimates and reported revenue increased 1.4% year-over-year. The company has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $91.36.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) Earns Buy Rating from Analysts at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group initiated coverage on The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) with a "buy" rating and a $250 price target, suggesting a 21.48% upside. This comes after PNC reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with $4.88 EPS and $6.07 billion in revenue. While analyst sentiment is generally positive, company insiders have been net sellers, divesting shares worth approximately $14.8 million recently.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Seals $5 Billion Sale to Power Firm LS Power: Here’s What’s Next
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) has completed a $16.4 billion acquisition of Calpine and subsequently agreed to sell 4.4 gigawatts of natural gas capacity to LS Power for $5 billion, satisfying DOJ and FERC conditions. The company reported strong Q4 results and full-year 2025 adjusted EPS of $9.39, exceeding guidance for the fourth consecutive year, driven by high nuclear capacity and new hyperscaler contracts. Analysts hold a positive outlook for CEG, anticipating significant EPS growth and a potential increase in stock value, especially with the upcoming March 31 combined-company guidance call.

feed.title: Hartford Financial Services : The Hartford To Announce First Quarter 2026 Earnings On April 23
feed.summary: The Hartford (NYSE: HIG) is scheduled to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 23, at approximately 4:15 p.m. EDT. Following the release, the company will host a webcast on Friday, April 24, at 9 a.m. EDT to discuss the earnings. The webcast will be accessible and archived on The Hartford's investor relations website for replay.

feed.title: From libraries to AEDs, 25 more small towns win T-Mobile grants
feed.summary: T-Mobile has announced 25 new recipients for its Hometown Grants program, bringing the total invested to over $21.5 million across 475 small towns and rural communities. These grants, up to $50,000 each, support projects ranging from community centers and libraries to vital health and educational initiatives, impacting 2.8 million people and creating nearly 2,700 jobs. With one final round remaining, T-Mobile aims to reach 500 towns, emphasizing its commitment to fostering growth and connectivity in underserved areas.

feed.title: AIG spinoff Corebridge Financial to merge with Equitable Holdings, creating $22B co.
feed.summary: Corebridge Financial, an AIG spinoff, is set to merge with Equitable Holdings, forming a new company valued at $22 billion. The combined entity will focus on retirement, life, wealth, and asset management, holding $1.5 trillion in assets under management and serving over 12 million customers. This merger aims to create a leader in the financial services sector with enhanced scale and diversified businesses.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Believe SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc. (SLS) Could Rally 63.58%: Here's is How to Trade
feed.summary: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc. (SLS) recently closed at $5.3, with analysts setting a mean price target of $8.67, suggesting a potential 63.6% upside. This optimistic outlook is further supported by a positive trend in earnings estimate revisions, indicating that analysts expect better earnings than previously projected. Despite the inherent biases in analyst price targets, the agreement among analysts and the company's Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) suggest a favorable short-term outlook for the stock.

feed.title: SK Telecom Shareholders Approve 2025 Results, Capital Changes and New Board Line-up
feed.summary: SK Telecom shareholders have approved the company's 2025 financial results, including a cash dividend and a reduction in capital reserve, demonstrating support for capital structure flexibility and shareholder returns. They also endorsed a new board lineup, signaling strong backing for SK Telecom's strategic focus on telecom and AI. Despite a "Neutral" rating from Spark's AI Analyst due to profitability concerns and a cautious outlook, SK Telecom maintains solid cash generation and a supported balance sheet.

feed.title: Apple adds Bosch, Cirrus Logic, others to US manufacturing program, to invest $400 million
feed.summary: Apple is expanding its American Manufacturing Program by adding Bosch, Cirrus Logic, TDK, and Qnity Electronics, planning to invest $400 million through 2030 to boost U.S.-based production of key components. This initiative aims to reduce geopolitical risks and strengthen domestic manufacturing of sensors, integrated circuits, and advanced materials for Apple devices. The expansion is expected to create jobs and enhance U.S. capabilities in semiconductor and advanced electronics manufacturing.

feed.title: BSX Investor Alert: BOSTON SCIENTIFIC CORPORATION Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misrepresenting Electrophysiology Procedure Growth
feed.summary: Investors who suffered losses in Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, are encouraged to contact SueWallSt regarding a securities fraud lawsuit. The suit alleges that Boston Scientific misrepresented its Electrophysiology (EP) procedure growth, leading to a significant stock drop after Q4 2025 results revealed slower-than-expected market growth and increased competition. The deadline to apply for lead plaintiff is May 4, 2026.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Celebrates 10 Years of Recognizing Team Members Who Go the Country Mile
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company is celebrating the 10th anniversary of its "Country Mile" recognition program, honoring a record 20 Team Members for their exceptional contributions to customers, communities, and animals. The program, which started in 2015, allows peers to recognize colleagues for embodying the company's values and going "above and beyond." This year's honorees were celebrated at the Annual Sales Meeting, highlighting the program's growing impact and the team members' dedication.

feed.title: Rapid7 Labs Identifies State-Sponsored Sleeper Cells Embedded in Global Telecommunications Networks
feed.summary: Rapid7 Labs has uncovered a sustained state-sponsored espionage campaign, dubbed "Red Menshen," involving "sleeper cells" embedded within global telecommunications networks. These covert operations, characterized by kernel-level backdoors and abuse of encrypted traffic, allow for long-term intelligence collection on subscriber activity and sensitive communications. Rapid7 is providing a free, open-source scanning script and integrating new detections into its offerings to help organizations identify and mitigate these advanced threats.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Apollo Global Management, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc., on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo's CEO Marc Rowan and former CEO Leon Black frequently communicated with Jeffrey Epstein regarding the firm's business, contradicting claims that Apollo never did business with Epstein. News reports detailing these connections led to significant drops in Apollo's stock price, forming the basis for the class action.

feed.title: IT Investor Alert: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Claims Company Inflated Consulting Outlook: SueWallSt
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has announced a securities class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT), alleging the company made misrepresentations about its contract value and consulting segment performance between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit claims Gartner failed to adequately disclose a steady deceleration in its core growth metric (Contract Value) and issued misleading guidance for its Consulting segment. Investors who purchased Gartner securities during this period and suffered losses may seek lead plaintiff status by May 18, 2026.

feed.title: Merrill and Bank of America Private Bank Launch AI-Powered Meeting Journey
feed.summary: Merrill Wealth Management and Bank of America Private Bank have launched an AI-Powered Meeting Journey solution to optimize advisor-client interactions. This integrated tool leverages AI for meeting preparation, summarization, and follow-up, aiming to save financial advisors up to four hours per meeting annually. The initiative is part of Bank of America's broader strategy to deploy purpose-built AI across its operations, enhancing efficiency and client engagement.

feed.title: APO Investor Alert: APOLLO GLOBAL MANAGEMENT, INC. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Claims Black Concealed Epstein Payments: SueWallSt
feed.summary: SueWallSt has issued an investor alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc., naming co-founder Leon Black as a defendant. The lawsuit alleges that Black concealed his business ties with Jeffrey Epstein, leading to a drop in APO's share price. Investors who suffered losses between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, are encouraged to seek to lead the class action by May 1, 2026.

feed.title: SUEWALLST, LLP: INSTITUTIONAL RGNX HOLDERS FACE PORTFOLIO LOSSES FROM GENE THERAPY FRAUD
feed.summary: SUEWALLST, LLP has issued a notice alerting institutional investors holding REGENXBIO (RGNX) shares between February 9, 2022, and January 27, 2026, about potential portfolio losses due to alleged gene therapy fraud. The firm suggests these investors evaluate lead plaintiff opportunities in a pending securities class action. The lawsuit claims REGENXBIO made misleading statements regarding the safety of its RGX-111 gene therapy, leading to a 17.8% stock decline after an FDA clinical hold related to CNS tumor discovery.
